title: Top Attacker Source IPs - OCI Audit (l21d)
description: Ranks external source IPs by destructive/anomalous OCI control-plane activity, with the count of distinct event types each IP touched. Click a row to pivot into Log Explorer scoped to that Source IP for the full identity-attack drilldown.
query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' and 'Source IP' != null and ('Event Type' like '*delete*' or 'Event Type' like '*terminate*' or 'Event Type' like '*remove*' or 'Event Type' like '*update*' or 'Event Type' like '*create*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeletePolicy*' or 'Event Type' like '*DeleteCompartment*') | stats count as DestructiveEvents, distinctcount('Event Type') as DistinctActions, distinctcount('User Name') as Users by 'Source IP' | sort -DestructiveEvents

ask_ai_prompts: Which source IP shows the most destructive OCI activity and what did it delete?
Are any of these source IPs touching multiple user accounts (possible credential theft)?
